name: Santa's Thumbprints
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat margarine and sugar in a large bowl until fluffy.
3. Blend in egg and vanilla.
4. Add the combined oats and flour; mix well.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls; roll in chopped nuts.
6. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Make indentation in the center of each ball with a thumb.
8. Fill each thumbprint with about 1/4 teaspoon jelly.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until light golden brown.
10. Cool completely on a wire rack.
11. Store loosely covered.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
